title: vicia lutea subsp. cavanillesii
intro: Vicia lutea subsp. cavanillesii, also known as yellow vetchling or vetchling, is a perennial plant species in the pea family Fabaceae. Traditionally, Vicia lutea subsp. cavanillesii has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, including the relief of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as the treatment of digestive problems and menstrual cramps. Vicia lutea subsp. cavanillesii can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
